prompt: Write a complete 6-piece cold-email sequence targeting indie game studios (1-15 people, $50k-$2M revenue, Steam/itch.io) for openpatent.ai. Persona pain: LLM training data scraping of GDDs (game design docs), shader-code regurgitation by competitor studios, NDA gaps with publishers, no timestamped proof of mechanic invention before public demo. Deliver: (1) intro email (≤120 words, hook with LLM regurgitating a unique crafting-mechanic design doc), (2) 5-day followup (≤80 words, name the SHA-3/512 + C2PA + Ed25519 stack for code assets), (3) value-prop one-liner (≤25 words, sovereign custody of design docs), (4) 3 objection handlers ('We're too small', 'We use GitHub, isn't that enough', 'Publishers will freak out') each ≤60 words, (5) 1 anonymized case study (4-person studio in Helsinki, mechanic was scraped 14 days pre-launch, OTS timestamp + C2PA manifest settled the publisher royalty dispute in 3 weeks), (6) ROI line ('$29 starter vs $40k IP litigation, 1,379x leverage, 6-layer disclosure in 90 seconds'). Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {intro:string, followup:string, value_prop:string, objection_handlers:[3 strings], case_study:string, roi:string, signature:string}.
